ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to adjacent LUG events
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
Thanks to all of the attendees and presenters at the 2011 Lustre User Group (LUG). This year's event was hosted at the beautiful Marriott World Center in sunny Orlando, Florida.
==LUG 2011 Agenda==
LUG 2011, a three-day event, featured numerous presentations on select Lustre features, upcoming enhancements, site-specific experiences using Lustre, and much more.
<big>'''Tuesday, April 12 - LUG Day 1'''</big> - Marriott World Center
{| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''7:30 - 8:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Discussion of Lustre Community (Working Breakfast) – Galen Shipman, ORNL''' |- |'''8:45 - 9:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Galen_Shipman-Opening_talk.pdf|LUG Kickoff]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0fRUfrLAovA (Video)] :Galen Shipman, LUG Committee Chair, ORNL |- |'''9:00 - 9:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Peter_Jones-Community_Releases.pdf|Lustre Community Releases]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ycg-7pBmt80 (Video)] :Peter Jones, Whamcloud |- |'''9:30 - 10:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Douglas_Fuller_NCRC.pdf|Architecture and Implementation of Lustre at the National Climate Computing Research Center]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5VQYdsrPsoU (Video)] :Douglas Fuller, ORNL |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''10:00 - 10:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Coffee Break''' |- |'''10:30 - 11:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Frank_Indiviglio-Scientific_Users_Perspective.pdf|The Scientific User’s Perspective of Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GGqX2AbpsYQ (Video)] :Frank Indiviglio, NOAA |- |'''11:00 - 11:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Nathan_Rutman_MapReduce.pdf|Effective MapReduce on Lustre]]''''' :Nathan Rutman, Xyratex |- |'''11:30 - 12:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Andrew_Uselton_Lustre_Statistics.pdf|The Statistical Properties of Lustre Server-side I/O]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bci4LLOthlI (Video)] :Andrew Uselton, NERSC |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''12:00 - 1:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Review of Morning Presentations by Participants (Working Lunch) – Stephen Monk, Sandia''' |- |'''1:00 - 1:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Sarp_Oral-Testing_Methodology.pdf|Testing Methodology for Large Scale File Systems]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3VY1sReOyGc (Video)] :Sarp Oral, ORNL |- |'''1:30 - 2:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Chris_Gearing-Whamcloud_Quality.pdf|Whamcloud Test and Validation Toolset]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SK5UFVpW3tA (Video)] :Chris Gearing, Whamcloud |- |'''2:00 - 2:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Shuichi_Ihara_Cloud_Infrastructure.pdf|Cloud Infrastructure for Lustre QA and Benchmark]]''''' :Shuichi Ihara, Data Direct Networks |- |'''1:30 - 2:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Shinji_Sumimoto-Fujitsu_FEFS.pdf|An Overview of Fujitsu’s Lustre Based File System]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9Dt8HTx2gEw (Video)] :Shinji Sumimoto, Fujitsu |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''3:00 - 3:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Coffee Break''' |- |'''3:30 - 3:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Scott_Michael-DC_WAN.pdf|Empowering Multi-site Heterogeneous Workflows with Lustre-WAN]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m0ZPSFaaqGk (Video)] :Scott Michael, Indiana University |- |'''3:50 - 4:10''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Michael_Kluge-Lustre_WAN_ZIH.pptx|Lustre WAN at 100 Gigabit]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hXVNXRyzmc (Video)] :Michael Kluge, ZIH |- |'''4:10 - 4:30''' |'''''[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nwoNpH6CcnE Lustre WAN Panel discussion (Video)]''''' :NRL, TACC, Indiana University, ZIH |- |'''4:30 - 4:50''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Hugo_Falter-EOFS.pdf|Community Organization: EOFS]]''''' :Hugo Falter |- |'''4:50 - 5:10''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Bill_Boaz-HPCFS.pdf|Community Organization: HPCFS]]''''' :Bill Boaz |- |'''5:10 - 5:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Galen_Shipman-OpenSFS.pdf|Community Organization: OpenSFS]]''''' :Galen Shipman |- |'''5:30 - 6:00''' |'''''[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kz2827a9tYs Community Organization: Panel discussion (Video)]''''' :EOFS, HPCFS, OpenSFS |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''6:00 - 6:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''6:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Review of Afternoon Presentations by Participants (Working Dinner) – Sarp Oral''' |- |}
<big>'''Wednesday, April 13 - LUG Day 2'''</big> - Marriott World Center
{| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''7:30 - 8:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0" width=574|'''Follow Up Discussions of Open Communities (Working Breakfast) – Stephen Simms''' |- |'''8:30 - 10:00''' |'''''[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YxCuj1E6Bq4 Vendor Roundtable]''''' : |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''10:00 - 10:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Coffee Break''' |- |'''10:30 - 11:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-David_Dillow-OpenSFS_Roadmap.pdf|OpenSFS Lustre Architecture Roadmap]]''''' :David Dillow, OpenSFS |- |'''11:00 - 11:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Andreas_Dilger-LFSCK.pdf|Online File System check]]''''' :Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud |- |'''11:30 - 12:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Brian_Benhlendorf-ZFS_on_Linux.pdf|ZFS on Linux for Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QGjzkgnxgKc (Video)] :Brian Behlendorf, LLNL |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''12:00 - 1:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Review of Morning Presentations (Working Lunch) – Stephen Monk''' |- |'''1:00 - 1:15''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Johann_Lombardi-Btrfs.pdf|Overview and Requirements for a Btrfs OSD]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cCzrCfo4MdQ (Video)] :Johann Lombardi, Whamcloud |- |'''1:15 - 1:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Douglas_Fuller-Btrfs_Performance_Stabililty.pdf|Stability and Performance Analysis of Brtfs]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cCzrCfo4MdQ (Video)] :Douglas Fuller, ORNL |- |'''1:30 - 2:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Ben_Evans-Terascala.pdf|Lustre File Creation Performance Enhancements]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=423O1BTTQjA (Video)] :Ben Evans, Terascala |- |'''2:00 - 2:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Fan_Yong-Lustre_Metadata_Statahead.pdf|Lustre Metadata Operations Improvements]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7cQjEZg8izo (Video)] :Fan Yong, Whamcloud |- |'''2:30 - 3:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Nick_Cardo-Finding_Hidden_Problems.pdf|Detecting Hidden File System Problems]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hp8uUzcXp_I (Video)] :Nick Cardo, NERSC |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''3:00 - 3:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Coffee Break''' |- |'''3:30 - 4:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-John_Hammond-Log_Analysis_lltop.pdf|Log Analysis and lltop]]''''' :John Hammond, TACC |- |'''4:00 - 4:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Chris_Morrone_LMT_v2.pdf|Lustre Monitoring Tool (LMT)]]''''' :Chris Morrone, LLNL |- |'''4:30 - 5:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Frank_Heckes-Lustre_at_Juelich.pdf|Lustre at Juelich Supercomputing Center (JSC)]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tM1QKy7hVOg (Video)] :Frank Heckes, JSC |- |'''5:00 - 5:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-David_Dillow-Monitoring_Tools.pdf|Improving Management of Large Lustre File Systems]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v-w1XPvUMKI (Video)] :David Dillow, ORNL |- |'''5:30 - 6:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Aurelien_Degremont-Robinhood_Quick_Tour.pdf|Lustre/HSM binding]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gVkvZU-wjrY (Video)] :Aurelien Degremont, CEA |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''6:00 - 6:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Break''' |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''6:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Review of Afternoon Presentations (Working Dinner) – Sarp Oral''' |- |}
<big>'''Thursday, April 14 - LUG Day 3'''</big> - Marriott World Center
{| border=1 cellpadding=0 |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''7:30 - 8:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0" width=574|'''Community Planning for LUG 2012 (Working Breakfast) – Galen Shipman''' |- |'''8:30 - 9:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Robin_Humble-Lustre_Root.pdf|Lustre as a root file system]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DpnYkx69QSc (Video)] :Robin Humble, NCINF |- |'''9:00 - 9:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Diego_Moreno-NUMIOA.pdf|Lustre 2.0 in NUMIOA architectures]]''''' :Diego Moreno, Bull |- |'''9:30 - 10:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Eric_Barton-Health_Network.pdf|A Scalable Health Network for Lustre]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9UkWcftG5_E (Video)] :Eric Barton, Whamcloud |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''10:00 - 10:30''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''Coffee Break''' |- |'''10:30 - 11:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Jinshan_Xiong-Imperative_Recovery.pdf|Imperative Recovery]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DnGo4ntS6WA (Video)] :Jinshan Xiong, Whamcloud |- |'''11:00 - 11:30''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Oleg_Drokin-Wide_striping.pdf|Lustre File Striping across a Large Number of OSTs]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-myK3b5IDrk (Video)] :Oleg Drokin, Whamcloud |- |'''11:30 - 12:00''' |'''''[[Media:LUG-2011-Hitoshi_Sato-Lustre-TSUBAME2.pptx|Lustre use cases in the TSUBAME2.0 supercomputer]]''''' [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xaiv716xu10 (Video)] :Hitoshi Sato, Tokyo Institute of Technology |- |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''12:00''' |style="background:#E0E0E0"|'''LUG 2011 Concludes''' |- |} [[Lustre User Group 2010|<- LUG'10]] | [[Lustre User Group 2012|LUG'12 ->]]
